title: The Digidatapack
description: This Datapack add DIgimons into the Pixelmon mod.
body:
This Datapack add DIgimons into the Pixelmon mod, As of 2/21/2024 the datapack contains 185 digimons in total (not counting forms/megas/g-max,etc). I wish to and will continue to add more digimons into the pack! I hope everyone can enjoy this crossover between Digimon and Pokemon (FINALLY!)

Note: Please check the [Curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pixelmon-digimon-datapack) for more pictures and the digimon evolutions.
